title: Senior Teacher - MT Educare - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - MT Educare - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at MT Educare. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About MT Educare:
MT Educare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MT Educare!
